arguments.argument:
event_inherited() image_speed=0 image_alpha=0 bCanTakeDamage=0
//Enemy base statistics eName="Distorted Cry" eLevel=40 maxLife=12350 life=maxLife pointWorth=110 atkPower=13 stunResist=50 affiliation=8 dieSound=0 dieEffect=0 inactiveDist=10000
enemyProg=0 runAcc=2.25
splittingDist=0 splitColor=make_color_rgb(240,240,255)

deathAnim=0
